product.name: Lipstick
selling_points: Unlike ordinary lipsticks that leave marks on cups, this lipstick stays put, keeps cups clean, and resists smudging during daily wear.

creative_strategy.core_pain: Wearing lipstick leaves embarrassing lip marks on cups and smudges with everyday use, forcing constant cleanups and touch-ups.
creative_strategy.promise: A transfer-resistant lipstick that stays put on lips and keeps cups clean during daily wear.

character.appearance: Adult woman in her late 20s with medium skin tone, warm undertone; calm, approachable expression.
character.wardrobe: Simple light beige knit top, minimal jewelry.
character.hair_makeup: Shoulder-length hair in a low, neat bun; natural makeup with smooth matte red lipstick on lips.
character.performance_style: Subtle, relatable gestures and expressions; restrained and natural delivery.

scene.lighting: Soft natural daylight from a window, even and flattering.
scene.background: Clean white tile backsplash and light wood table; a small green plant in the background for warmth.
key_props: Lipstick bullet placed on table (for ad shot)

product.visual_identity: Standard lipstick bullet matching the reference: matte black case with a single metallic band, classic red shade; replicate shape, color, and any logo as shown in the product image. Keep any brand mark visible on the tube only.
product.proof_prop: Plain white ceramic mug (matte, no patterns).

shots.visual_prompt: Locked-off vertical medium close-up in the same bright kitchen. The woman in a beige top holds a plain white ceramic mug near camera, rotating it slightly to reveal a single small, crisp red lipstick mark on the rim. She glances at the mark, gives a mild "ugh" look, and exhales softly. The camera stays steady and the mark remains clearly visible. Soft daylight, calm mood.
shots.start_key_image_prompt: Vertical 9:16 frame, medium close-up at a light wood kitchen table. The woman (late 20s, medium skin, low bun, beige top) holds a plain white ceramic mug with one small red lipstick mark already on the rim facing the camera. Her other hand lightly supports the mug. Soft natural window light. Background is a clean white-tile backsplash and a small plant. Camera on tripod, steady. No product tube visible yet. The lipstick on her lips looks slightly worn, realistic.
shots.negative_prompt: Handheld shake, montage, split screen, exaggerated or smeared lipstick all over, multiple or giant stains, dirty or cracked mug, clear glass cup, strong reflections, mirrored or unreadable text, extra logos in background, cluttered kitchen, harsh lighting, flicker, AI artifacts, extra fingers or warped hands, out-of-focus rim, gore or distress.
shots.audio: Light, friendly background music. Soft sigh from the woman. Subtle "plink" SFX when she spots the mark. No harsh or comedic stings.

shots.visual_prompt: Same kitchen, same framing and wardrobe. The lipstick bullet stands upright on the table at frame right with its logo side oriented toward camera (as in reference). The woman’s lips are neatly finished with smooth matte red lipstick. She picks up the plain white mug, takes a natural sip, then brings the rim close to the camera so it fills most of the frame, rotating slightly to show the rim is clean with no lipstick transfer. She gives a small confident smile and a subtle nod. Camera remains locked-off and steady.
shots.start_key_image_prompt: Vertical 9:16 medium close-up in the same kitchen setup. The lipstick tube (matte black with metallic band) stands on the light wood table at frame right, label side facing camera per the product image. The woman (low bun, beige top) faces camera with fresh matte red lipstick applied cleanly. She holds a pristine, dry plain white ceramic mug near her mouth, rim clearly visible and spotless. Soft, even daylight; background consistent with white tile and small plant. Tripod shot, steady.
shots.negative_prompt: Handheld shake, cuts or montage, blurred rim, reflective or glass cup, popping logos in the background, added subtitles, unrealistic shine or smeared lipstick, warped hands, extra fingers, jitter, flicker, mirrored or stretched product, overexposed highlights, dirty or patterned mug.
shots.audio: Upbeat, clean background track continues. Soft ceramic clink SFX as mug touches table at the end. Voiceover (same woman, warm and concise): "Transfer-resistant. Cups stay clean."
